The Stage

Where Ambition
Meets the World

Eight committees. Eight of the most pressing questions facing humanity right now. Delegates from across India will converge at the University of Delhi to debate, negotiate, and draft the resolutions that the world's real leaders haven't been able to agree on.

Our Philosophy

About Aether

Something has been quietly going wrong with MUN. Over the last few years, conferences have drifted — from spaces built around serious debate and intellectual growth, to events that look great on Instagram and feel more like social gatherings with formal dress codes.

Aether Youth Summit exists because two people refused to accept that as the new normal. Built by students who have been in this circuit long enough to know what's been lost, and guided by advisors who have spent nearly a decade organising some of the most respected conferences in the country.

"Aether is a deliberate return to what MUN was always meant to be."

The committees are rigorous. The agendas are substantive. The standard expected of delegates is high — and so is the standard we hold ourselves to as organisers.

— Aude. Age. Ascende.

For Schools

School Delegations

Schools are welcome to register as official delegations at a preferential rate. Group registration gives your students first access to country allotments — the earlier your delegation arrives prepared, the better they perform.

Reach out directly. We'll handle the paperwork and make the process straightforward for Faculty Advisors.

Contact for School Registration
15
Minimum Delegates
Accompanied by a Faculty Advisor for official status.
₹1900
Per Delegate
Preferential group rate. All standard perks included.
1st
Priority Allotment
Early delegations get first pick of committees and countries.
Frequently Asked Questions

Before You Ask

What is a Model United Nations?
+
An academic simulation where students represent countries, debate global issues, negotiate, and draft resolutions. It builds research, public speaking, negotiation, and leadership under pressure.
Do I need prior MUN experience?
+
No. UNEA is our designated Beginners' Committee. We also provide complimentary pre-conference training on Rules of Procedure, research, and documentation.
What happens after I register?
+
After registration you'll receive a confirmation with your committee and country allotment. Study guides and background materials will be shared closer to the event.
Are the certificates valid for ECA quota?
+
Yes. Aether Youth Summit is registered under MSMED Act 2006 (NIC Code 8550). Certificates are valid for the ECA quota at Delhi University and other prestigious institutions.
What is a Double Delegation?
+
Two delegates jointly representing one country — available for IAEA and Mock IPL. Both partners coordinate research, strategy, and speaking time together.
Can I participate if I'm outside Delhi?
+
Yes. The WHO committee runs fully online at ₹500/delegate — open to participants anywhere in India.
What are the prizes and awards?
+
₹1,00,000+ total distributed across all committees. Top delegates get cash prizes, trophies, and mementos. Every delegate gets a participation trophy.
How do I contact the team?
+
Email: summitaetheryouth@gmail.com · Vihaan: +91 72062 57937 · Shivank: +91 98714 64551 · Instagram: @aetheryouthsummit
